session.name: MPI-272 media-load path-into-string cleanup — Phases 1/2 shipped, raw→API pipeline rebuilt + validator gate, Phase 3 injector coded awaiting live-ux test

goal.original: Continue MPI-272: migrate app off the OLD media-load system (placeholder.png/ltx_silence.wav staging + _uploadImage upload branch + generator STAMP steps) onto the path-into-string system the workflows already use. Full removal EXCEPT latents.
goal.summary: Phases 1 (generators), 2 (backend staging), stragglers, krea2, and reconverts all COMMITTED. The raw→API tooling (Phase 5) grew into a full git-driven pipeline rebuild with an injection-rules validator gate — committed, raw/ now tracked. Phase 3 (the risky injector rewrite) is CODED but NOT committed and awaits the user's live-app UX test. 20 generated workflow files are staged (uncommitted) for /mpi-end.

completed: Phase 1: generators — dropped placeholder/silence STAMP from all 7 generate_*.py (bde02016)
Phase 2: backend — WORKFLOW_INPUT_DEFAULTS + _MEDIA_INPUT_CLASSES narrowed to latents only (2afe11ea)
raw/ read-only guards in both converters (f918c907)
Phase 5 tooling: git-driven sync-raw-workflows.mjs + validate-injection-rules.mjs gate (5921e30d)
raw/ sources tracked in git — 23 files (4d62d586)
pending: Phase 3: injector rewrite CODED not committed — USER LIVE-UX TEST then commit

Phase 5 docs: reference the raw→API sync command in add-model + add-app playbooks (tooling already built)
/mpi-end: commit the 20 staged generated workflow files

task_card.title: Media-load system migration — path-into-string cleanup (kill placeholder/silence, keep latents)

allowed_actions: commit Phase 3 after the user confirms the live-ux test passes

completed: plan.md updated: Plan Drift + full Session state @ 2026-07-13 block (commits, staged state, Phase 3 resume point)
Memory feedback_raw_workflows_user_owned.md written + indexed in MEMORY.md (raw/ is user-owned, read-only to tooling)
pending: After Phase 3 commits: write a feedback memory 'media injection is now path→string only; nodes self-gate; latents are the sole staging survivor'
Consider a new kanban card for the NVIDIA_PID seed bug the validator caught (user already fixed the raw workflow; the card would track whether other workflows need the same Input_Seed audit)
/mpi-end must commit the 20 staged generated workflow files (API templates + orchestrated runtime)

next_action.description: Resume at Phase 3. The injector rewrite in js/services/comfyController.js is coded but NOT committed. Ask the user to exercise it in the LIVE app: i2i (Input_Image), detailer (Input_Mask, mask channel), t2v-with-no-start-frame, reuse-prompt on a real gallery card, then delete a reused card's .preview-assets source and re-run reuse (expect a WARNING toast 'assets no longer exist', NOT the crash dialog), and one image gen on a connected remote Pod. When the user confirms all pass, commit Phase 3. Then do Phase 4 (git rm placeholder.png + ltx_silence.wav, rewrite injection docs) and Phase 5 docs (reference the raw→API sync command in the add-model/add-app playbooks). Do NOT re-run orchestrate.py — the tree has 20 staged generated files; /mpi-end will commit them.

key_decisions: raw/ is now TRACKED in git and is the source of truth for 'what changed' (git-diff, not mtime). raw/ is USER-OWNED and read-only to ALL tooling — both converters hard-refuse writing into raw/.

sync-raw-workflows.mjs commits the RAW sources FIRST (record of the user's edit), then converts→validates→orchestrates, and leaves generated API+runtime STAGED for /mpi-end (one generated-workflow commit per session, not per sync).

A new validator (scripts/validate-injection-rules.mjs) gates every converted API before bake against the injection rules (title-prefix law, capture node, seed convention MPI-257, dangling/unknown-node). ANY violation STOPS the run and names the node — the user fixes in ComfyUI and re-exports; agents NEVER edit workflow JSON.

Title-law check only flags a deprecated bare title when NO Input_<name>/Output_<name> sibling exists (else the bare node is a legitimate workflow-internal helper, e.g. MpiWanSeconds 'Duration' fed by an 'Input_Duration' MpiInt).

Phase 3 injector: image+mask now flip to 'imagepath' when the target node is MpiLoadImageFromPath, routing through the path-resolve branch (_resolveMediaPath + _uploadRemoteMedia) instead of the deleted _uploadImage upload-name branch. The reuse-404 soft-error is preserved via a NEW _assertMediaSourceExists (HEAD probe on /project-file?path=; 404 → tagged input_asset_deleted).
constraints: NEVER write/move/convert-in-place/git-checkout anything under comfy_workflows/raw/ — user's only editable LiteGraph sources; overwriting with API JSON is unrecoverable. See feedback_raw_workflows_user_owned.
Do NOT re-run orchestrate.py on the current dirty tree — it global-rebuilds and would clobber the 20 staged generated files. See feedback_orchestrate_global_rebuild_hazard.
Agents NEVER edit workflow JSON under comfy_workflows/ (injection rule). Contract changes → tell the user to re-title/re-author in the ComfyUI graph and re-export.
Phase 3 touches the local/remote engine twin — the user must verify BOTH the local path-inject AND the Pod _uploadRemoteMedia path. See feedback_check_both_engine_paths.
comfyController.js routes are NOT hot-reloaded and the user owns port 3000/8188 — do not restart their app or engine to test.
The validator needs a running ComfyUI (/object_info on 8188). Engine was up (200) this session.
comfy_workflows/Model Merger.json + raw/Model Merger.json are the user's personal tool — gitignored, never processed/committed.

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/fe749847-e6e1-4360-8896-d9634dbf0782.json and use mpi-continue to resume MPI-272 (media-load path-into-string cleanup, branch 1.2.0). Phases 1 and 2 are committed. The raw→API pipeline was rebuilt this session: raw/ is now tracked in git, sync-raw-workflows.mjs is git-driven (commit raw first → convert → validate-gate → orchestrate → stage generated for /mpi-end), and a new scripts/validate-injection-rules.mjs gates every converted API against the injection rules. 20 generated workflow files are STAGED but uncommitted (do NOT re-run orchestrate.py). The resume point is Phase 3: the injector rewrite in js/services/comfyController.js (image+mask → 'imagepath' path-resolve branch, deleted _uploadImage, added _assertMediaSourceExists for the reuse-404 warning toast) is CODED but NOT committed. Ask the user to test it in the LIVE app — i2i, detailer with a mask, t2v with no start frame, reuse-prompt on a gallery card, delete a reused card's .preview-assets source then reuse (expect a WARNING toast, not the crash dialog), and one remote-Pod image gen — then commit Phase 3. Never edit workflow JSON or write into comfy_workflows/raw/. After Phase 3, do Phase 4 (git rm placeholder.png + ltx_silence.wav, rewrite injection docs) and Phase 5 docs (reference the raw→API sync command in the add-model/add-app playbooks).
